item.title: Allergens (full list)
item.description: Allergens: 1. Gluten 2. Eggs 3. Fish 4. Peanuts 5. Crustaceans 6. Milk 7. Soy 8. Sesame 9. Nuts 10. Celery 11. Mustard 12. Lupine 13. Sulphur dioxide 14. Molluscs 15. Garlic

item.title: 🍽 HUB1 - Sprout Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB1 - Sprout Lunch Menu: Our daily meal salad rich in seasonal vegetables with a choice of protein

item.title: 🍽 HUB1 - Homebound Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB1 - Homebound Lunch Menu: Swedish meatballs served with silky mashed potatoes and rich brown cream sauce,topped with peas tossed in cold pressed rapeseed oil and fresh parsley.Lingonberry jam and pickled cucumbers on the side (1+2+6)

item.title: 🍽 HUB1 - Globetrotter Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB1 - Globetrotter Lunch Menu: BBQ pulled turkey tossed with onions and cabbage, served on crispy potato röstiand topped with creamy mornay sauce and fresh spring onions. Horseradish andchive sauce with cucumber and apple salad on the side (6+13+15) GREEN DISH: dish BBQ pulled oyster mushrooms with onions and cabbage, served on crispy potatorösti and topped with mornay sauce and spring onions. Horseradish and chivesauce with cucumber and apple salad on the side

item.title: 🍽 HUB3 - Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB3 - Lunch Menu: Tagine with spiced chicken, slow cooked with warm aromatic spices, served withfluffy couscous infused with fresh herbs and preserved lemon (1+15) GREEN DISH: dish Spiced chickpea tagine full of warm flavour, served with fluffy couscous tossedwith fresh herbs and preserved lemon

item.title: 🍽 HUB2 - Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB2 - Lunch Menu: Mapo tofu, a classic from the Chinese Sichuan kitchen, where pork and tofu cometogether in a bold and aromatic sauce with chili, ginger, mushrooms and deeplyflavoured broth. Served with steamed rice (7+8+15) GREEN DISH: dish GREEN DISH: mapo tofu with tofu, chili, ginger and mushrooms in a rich andwarming sauce full of depth and spice. Served with rice (6+10+13)

item.title: 🍽 HUB1 – Kays - Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB1 – Kays - Lunch Menu: Spiced Mexican stew with pork, vegetables and beans, slow simmered for warmthand depth, served with brown rice and topped with fresh spring onions. Limeyoghurt, coriander and jalapeños on the side (13+15) GREEN DISH: dish Spiced Mexican stew with soy protein, vegetables and beans, rich in warm spicesand full flavour, served with brown rice and topped with spring onions. Limeyoghurt, coriander and jalapeños on the side
